title: Selaginella rossii
intro: Selaginella rossii, also known as Spikemoss or Ross's Spike Moss, is a type of fern ally plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate conditions such as arthritis and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Selaginella rossii include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Selaginella rossii is commonly prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
